title: Aureline history-edit sequence-step vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the sequence_step_record family frozen in docs/vcs/history_edit_and_recovery_contract.md. One sequence_step_record pins the per-step review row a reviewer reads before any topology-changing operation runs (sequence_step_kind_class drawn from the closed eleven-value vocabulary covering pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / exec / break / label / reset / merge_replay re-exported from schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json sequence_editor_operation_class; sequence_step_status_class drawn from the closed eight-value vocabulary covering pre-execution review, in-progress, paused-pending-conflict, paused-pending-protected-path, paused-pending-signoff, paused-pending-base-or-head-identity-changed, completed, aborted-rolled-back; auto_continue_state_class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary so auto-continue is structurally blocked while conflicts, protected-path blockers, missing signoff, or changed base/head identity remain unresolved; object_model_change_class drawn from the closed four-value vocabulary covering rewrite-history, append-new-revert-commit, replay-onto-new-target, and pick-in-place-no-change; cited recovery_object_record_id_ref before any non-pick step is admitted). One sequence_step_audit_event_record carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. The row is the per-step boundary every reviewer reads to tell what object-model change a step will produce, what recovery object exists, and what auto-continue blocker remains; it pairs with one history_edit_review_record (schemas/vcs/history_edit_review.schema.json) per parent review and may pair with one sequence_editor_operation_record (schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json) when the step lives inside a sequence-editor plan. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / lifecycle state only. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, sequence_step_kind_class, sequence_step_status_class, auto_continue_state_class, object_model_change_class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps sequence_step_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

sequence_step_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the sequence-step vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

conflict_handoff_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/change_object.schema.json. Pairs with merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref and history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref forward-dependency slots.

sequence_step_kind_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json sequence_editor_operation_class. The sequence-step row pins the kind so the per-kind invariants on this schema are read directly without re-resolving the parent sequence_editor_operation_record.

sequence_step_status_class.description: Frozen sequence-step status vocabulary. step_drafted_pending_review is the row at mint before the user has confirmed. step_admitted_pending_run is the row after confirm but before the executor picks it up. step_in_progress_running is the active row. step_paused_pending_conflict pairs with conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision. step_paused_pending_protected_path_review pairs with auto_continue_blocked_protected_path_modification. step_paused_pending_signoff pairs with auto_continue_blocked_pending_signoff. step_paused_pending_base_or_head_identity_changed pairs with auto_continue_blocked_base_or_head_identity_changed. step_completed and step_aborted_rolled_back are terminal.

auto_continue_state_class.description: Frozen auto-continue gating vocabulary. auto_continue_admissible is the only state in which a downstream executor may advance to the next step without explicit user re-confirmation. The four blocked states are exhaustive: a conflict pending decision, a protected-path modification pending review, a missing signoff (commit signoff or owner approval) pending decision, or a changed base / head identity since admission. Auto-continue is structurally blocked in any blocked state; a row that admits the next step from a blocked state denies with sequence_step_auto_continue_blocked_resolution_required.

object_model_change_class.description: Frozen object-model change vocabulary describing what the step's confirm will produce. object_model_pick_in_place_no_change covers a sequence_op_pick whose parent matches the prior parent (no rewrite). object_model_rewrite_history covers reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay where the post-step history differs from the pre-step history. object_model_append_new_revert_commit covers a non-rewriting revert that appends a new commit (the pre-step history is preserved). object_model_replay_onto_new_target covers cherry-pick or sequence_op_pick replayed onto an alternate target / base.

protected_path_blocker_class.description: Frozen protected-path blocker vocabulary. no_protected_path_blocker is the default. The remaining three values name the review path the protected-path policy requires before auto-continue is admissible. The schema pairs every non-default value with auto_continue_blocked_protected_path_modification through allOf.

signoff_blocker_class.description: Frozen signoff blocker vocabulary. no_signoff_blocker is the default. The remaining three values name the kind of signoff the policy requires before auto-continue is admissible. The schema pairs every non-default value with auto_continue_blocked_pending_signoff through allOf.

base_or_head_identity_drift_class.description: Frozen base / head identity drift vocabulary. base_and_head_identity_unchanged_since_admission is the only state in which auto-continue is admissible from this dimension. The remaining three values pair with auto_continue_blocked_base_or_head_identity_changed through allOf so a step that resumed against a drifted base or head denies.

sequence_step_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the sequence_step audit stream.

sequence_step_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the sequence_step stream. sequence_step_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a sequence_step_denial_reason.

history_edit_review_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the parent history_edit_review_record (schemas/vcs/history_edit_review.schema.json). Always non-null.

sequence_editor_plan_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the sequence_editor_plan_record (schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json) the step lives inside, when the parent review is a rewrite-history review backed by a sequence-editor plan. Null on cherry-pick / revert / restack reviews that do not bind to a sequence-editor plan.

sequence_editor_operation_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the sequence_editor_operation_record (schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json) this step pairs with, when the step is the review-side mirror of a sequence-editor operation. Null on cherry-pick / revert / restack steps that do not pair with a sequence-editor operation.

ordinal.description: Zero-based ordinal preserving the parent review's step order.

target_change_object_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the change_object_record this step targets. Required (non-null) for sequence_op_pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay; null for sequence_op_exec / break / label / reset (denies with sequence_step_target_or_output_change_object_id_ref_mismatch on a mismatch).

output_change_object_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the synthesized change_object_record produced by this step (when applicable). Required (non-null) on completed reword / edit / squash / fixup / merge_replay; null on drop / exec / break / label / reset and on rows whose status has not yet completed.

replay_target_base_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the alternate target base identity the step replays onto. Required (non-null) when object_model_change_class is object_model_replay_onto_new_target; null otherwise.

recovery_object_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the recovery_object_record (schemas/vcs/recovery_object.schema.json) pinned for this step before any non-pick admission. Required (non-null) when sequence_step_kind_class is anything other than sequence_op_pick / sequence_op_label and the status is past step_drafted_pending_review (denies with sequence_step_recovery_object_required_before_non_pick_admission). May be null on a pick-in-place step or on a step still in step_drafted_pending_review.

completed_at.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_step_status_class is step_completed. Null otherwise.

aborted_at.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_step_status_class is step_aborted_rolled_back. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: step_paused_pending_conflict MUST pair with auto_continue_blocked_pending_conflict and conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision; auto-continue is structurally blocked.
step_paused_pending_protected_path_review MUST pair with auto_continue_blocked_protected_path_modification and a non-default protected_path_blocker_class.
step_paused_pending_signoff MUST pair with auto_continue_blocked_pending_signoff and a non-default signoff_blocker_class.
step_paused_pending_base_or_head_identity_changed MUST pair with auto_continue_blocked_base_or_head_identity_changed and a non-default base_or_head_identity_drift_class.

auto_continue_admissible is only reachable when every blocker is at its default value and conflict_handoff_class is no_conflict_path_required or one of the *_admitted_user_resolved values; a row that mismatches denies with sequence_step_auto_continue_blocked_resolution_required.
object_model_replay_onto_new_target MUST cite a non-null replay_target_base_identity_ref and the kind class MUST be sequence_op_pick or sequence_op_merge_replay.

object_model_rewrite_history is only admissible for kinds whose post-step history differs from the pre-step history (reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay); a mismatch denies with sequence_step_object_model_change_class_must_match_kind.
object_model_pick_in_place_no_change is only admissible for sequence_op_pick.

Non-pick / non-label kinds in any status past step_drafted_pending_review MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_record_id_ref (denies with sequence_step_recovery_object_required_before_non_pick_admission).

pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay MUST cite a non-null target_change_object_id_ref; exec / break / label / reset MUST cite null target_change_object_id_ref and null output_change_object_id_ref.
drop MUST cite a null output_change_object_id_ref.
step_completed reword / edit / squash / fixup / merge_replay MUST cite a non-null output_change_object_id_ref.
step_completed MUST cite a non-null completed_at.
step_aborted_rolled_back MUST cite a non-null aborted_at.
Non-terminal statuses MUST cite null completed_at and null aborted_at.

sequence_step_record.description: Row shape consumed by the sequence-editor plan view, the cherry-pick / revert review surface, the patch-series restack review surface, the change-stack panel, the source-control panel, and the support / export bundle. Exactly one row per sequence-step identity.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_step_audit_event_id_value is sequence_step_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is sequence_step_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

sequence_step_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the sequence_step stream.
